claim: The project is a Japanese/English analytics and prediction pipeline for spinal-cord-injury rehabilitation.
quote:
Bilingual (JA / EN) analytics + prediction pipeline for a spinal-cord-injury (SCI)
rehabilitation center.

claim: Schema YAML drives clinical labels, factor levels, and UI strings for Japanese and English rendering.
quote:
All clinical content (column labels, factor levels, UI
strings) is data-driven from `schema/*.yaml`, so the same code base renders
identical results in Japanese and English.

claim: The committed repository ships code, schema, and aggregate descriptive statistics without row-level patient data.
quote:
The repository only ships
> code, schema, and aggregated descriptive statistics, with *no* row-level patient
> data.

claim: The loader reads cp932 and normalizes _, NT, NA, and ND as missing sentinels.
quote:
Reads the raw file as **cp932** (Shift-JIS superset).
- Normalizes the `_` / `NT` / `NA` / `ND` missing sentinels.

claim: After filtering 301 empty placeholder episodes, the analysis universe is 899 episodes from 866 unique patients.
quote:
The analysis
universe is therefore **899 episodes / 866 unique patients**

claim: Admission features start at 0day and backfill through 72h, 2w, and 4w using the first non-null value.
quote:
Admission features are taken from the `0day` timepoint with backfill from
`72h → 2w → 4w` (first-non-null wins)

claim: The current registry contains 11 outcomes: four SCIM-III regressions, five ISNCSCI change regressions, discharge AIS, and length of stay.
Every outcome uses patient-grouped splitting to prevent multiple episodes from one patient leaking across splits.
quote:
prevents leakage when a patient has
  multiple episodes.  Used for every outcome.

claim: Regression intervals use a 20% development calibration fold and the 80th percentile of absolute residuals.
quote:
20 % of the dev
  set is held out as a calibration fold; the 80 % PI half-width is the
  0.80-quantile of `|y − ŷ|` on the modelling scale

claim: The dashboard has overview, simulator, patient, insights, and methods tabs.
A Japanese/English setting rerenders labels, axes, hovers, tab titles, and option lists.
quote:
every label, axis, hover, tab title, and option list rerenders from the
schema's `ja` / `en` fields.

claim: The simulator reports completeness and out-of-distribution signals separately, while its fixed calibrated interval does not widen as input becomes sparse.
quote:
The conformal PI half-width is a fixed calibrated scalar, so it does NOT widen
as input grows sparser.

claim: The quality engine checks domain, cross-field, and longitudinal contradictions, and missing prerequisites are not violations.
quote:
Each rule fires only when every field it needs is present and the values
contradict, so missing data is never a violation.

claim: Interpretation: aggregate findings are review candidates rather than adjudicated errors, and they do not feed model training.
quote:
Findings are for data review only and never feed model
training

claim: Aggregate quality rules recorded 2,140 findings: domain 1,052, cross-field 798, and longitudinal 290; 417 episodes were flagged.
Whether external or prospective validation has been completed requires human confirmation.
The truth and correction status of individual quality flags require review by an authorized human.
The project is internal research code and has no public license at present.
quote: Internal research code; no public license at this time.
